case_title: WILLIAM R. WHITTEN JR. VS. KAREN KRUGER et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY WHITTEN JR., WILLIAM R. KRUGER, KAREN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2009 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WHITTEN JR., WILLIAM R. AS TO DEFENDANT KRUGER, KAREN KOPP, QUENTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITTEN JR., WILLIAM R. AS TO DEFENDANT KOPP, QUENTIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-29-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KRUGER, KAREN
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO QUENTIN KOPP.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITTEN JR., WILLIAM R. AS TO DEFENDANT KOPP, QUENTIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITTEN JR., WILLIAM R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KRUGER, KAREN THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN DEFENDANT WAS NEGLIGENT UNDER THE CIRCUMSTANCES OF THE SUDDEN EMERGENCY CREATED BY THE INITIAL IMPACT BY A NON PARTY TO THE CASE OR THAT DEFENDANT HAD NOT PROPERLY MAINTAINED HER VEHICLE AT THE TIME OF THE ACCIDENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
